activities_projects.title: Behavior Analysis Chart
steps: List 5 notable behaviors of Mijbil
Explain why he behaved that way
Give examples from the chapter to support your explanation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will understand animal behavior and character observation.

activities_projects.title: Comparative Traits Study
activities_projects.objective: Compare Mijbil’s traits with a common pet.
steps: Select a common pet (dog, cat, etc.)
List similarities and differences in behavior with Mijbil
Write a short paragraph comparing them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will develop analytical and comparative skills.

activities_projects.title: Diary Entry from Owner’s Perspective
steps: Imagine you are the owner for a day
Write a diary entry describing Mijbil’s actions and your reactions
Include observations, emotions, and care tips
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will enhance empathy and creative writing skills.
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, relevance, and expression of emotions

activities_projects.title: Event Cause and Effect Chart
activities_projects.objective: Analyze how events influence Mijbil’s behavior.
steps: Identify 4 major events in the story
Write the cause and effect of each event on Mijbil
Discuss how events affected his personality or habits
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will develop analytical reasoning and sequencing skills.

activities_projects.title: Creative Story Extension
steps: Imagine an event not described in the chapter
Write 5–6 sentences continuing the story
Include realistic behavior of Mijbil and interaction with humans
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will enhance imagination while staying faithful to character traits.

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Application Paragraph
steps: Select 8–10 new words from the chapter
Write their meanings
Use all words in a short paragraph describing Mijbil’s day
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will strengthen vocabulary and writing skills.
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct usage, sentence structure, and clarity

activities_projects.title: Poster – Caring for Pets
activities_projects.objective: Promote responsibility and empathy towards animals.
steps: List 5 care tips for keeping pets happy and healthy
Add illustrations of Mijbil or other pets
Present your poster to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will learn responsible pet care and express ideas visually.

activities_projects.title: Role Play – Mijbil’s Adventure
activities_projects.objective: Experience events from the story actively.
steps: Assign roles (Mijbil, owner, family)
Enact a scene showing Mijbil’s mischievous or playful behavior
Reflect on the interaction and emotions in the scene
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will enhance expressive skills, teamwork, and empathy.
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation, expression, and understanding of characters

activities_projects.title: Event Timeline with Emotions
activities_projects.objective: Understand emotional progression of Mijbil and owner.
steps: Identify 5–6 key events in the chapter
Assign emotions to Mijbil and the owner for each event
Draw a timeline showing events and emotional progression
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will connect actions with emotional responses.

activities_projects.title: Q&A Comprehension Activity
activities_projects.objective: Develop deeper understanding of the story.
steps: Write 5–7 questions about events, characters, or behaviors
Answer them in complete sentences
Pair up with a classmate to discuss answers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will improve comprehension and critical thinking.
